subject: Attempt 2 at chart restructure
commit_message:
Attempt 2 at chart restructure

Helm value override file now supports component-specific settings:

dcae-bootstrap:
  enabled: true
dcae-cloudify-manager:
  enabled: true
dcae-config-binding-service:
  enabled: true
dcae-healthcheck:
  enabled: true
dcae-redis:
  enabled: true
dcae-servicechange-handler:
  enabled: true
dcae-inventory-api:
  enabled: true
dcae-deployment-handler:
  enabled: true
dcae-policy-handler:
  enabled: true
dcae-dashboard:
  enabled: true

Issue-ID: OOM-1574
Signed-off-by: Ubuntu <dgl@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I85e0fe6ae19e176d954611549ec954a5fe662307
Signed-off-by: Ubuntu <dgl@research.att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

The new chart overrides did not work with local/onap dcae deployment; emailed Dom and this is under analysis

Patch Set 2:

Just documenting here what I responded previously in email.  As far as I can tell, the helm deploy uses the master branch version of this repo so until this is merged, not all use cases work.  If this is true, then I would recommend merging this commit and deal with any issues in a separate Jira.   ALso, the failures reported by the Orange JobBuilder are for other non-DCAE components, so they are not applicable to this commit.
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> Just documenting here what I responded previously in email.  As far as I can tell, the helm deploy uses the master branch version of this repo so until this is merged, not all use cases work.  If this is true, then I would recommend merging this commit and deal with any issues in a separate Jira.   ALso, the failures reported by the Orange JobBuilder are for other non-DCAE components, so they are not applicable to this commit.

Orange JobDeployer is using your chart and it's true that DCAE part is OK (both pods and healtchecks)
Waiting for +1 from Vijay before merge

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

Yes I confirm the normal deployment was successful. The issue I noticed dcae-component override was not effective under helm deploy of local/onap -->
helm deploy dev local/onap --namespace onap -f ~/dcae_overrides.yaml -f ~/dcae_component_override.yaml 

Not sure if this is related to version 6.0.0 upgrade done with this change for DCAE alone. If OOM team is okay with version update, I can remove the -1.

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

I think this patch needs a discussion at OOM weekly meeting
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott

Patch Set 2:
